question: [File: 'File Name: rest/controllers/tokenAllowanceController.js -> Scope: Critical: Network not being able to confirm new transactions (total network shutdown)'] [Function: TokenAllowanceService.getQuery()] Can an unprivileged external user trigger the three-subquery UNION ALL path in getQuery() and observe that the outer UNION ALL query applies orderClause and limitClause after combining all subquery results, causing the DB to sort up to 3*limit rows (300 rows at max limit) per request, and under high concurrency cause DB CPU exhaustion that prevents the importer from processing new transactions?
